heroHeadline: BTS Charts History: 'SWIM' Tops Billboard Hot 100, ARIRANG Debuts at No. 1 with 641K Units — Arirang World Tour Begins April 9
heroSubtitle: Tracking 4,676+ days of K-pop history — ARIRANG (released March 20, 2026) is BTS's 7th Billboard 200 No. 1 album (641K units), 'SWIM' is their 7th Hot 100 No. 1 single, and BTS became the first act to simultaneously top both charts. 13 ARIRANG tracks on the Hot 100. Arirang World Tour kicks off April 9 in Goyang, South Korea.
footerNote: Data sourced from HYBE, Billboard, Hanteo Chart, Gaon Chart, Melon, Spotify, Netflix, Guinness World Records, IFPI, and Recording Academy.
